sections.paragraph: n. gent. pl. 2Ch 12:3 16:8 Nah 3:9, and לֻבִּים Dan 11:43, [Lubim], Libyans, always connected with the Egyptians and Ethiopians. Comp. לְהָבִים. Arab. لُوِىُّ a Libyan; if this be a Phœnicio-Shemitic word, it properly signifies, an inhabitant of a thirsty, i.e. an arid country; compare צִיִּים.
